# Diplomat's Pack

A Diplomat's Pack contains the following items: [[chest]], [[fine_clothes]], [[ink]], 5 [[ink_pen|Ink Pens]], [[lamp]], 2 [[map_or_scroll_case|Map or Scroll Cases]], 4 flasks of [[oil]], 5 sheets of [[paper]], 5 sheets of [[parchment]], [[perfume]], and [[tinderbox]].
